roadClosures.road: BNSF RR Crossing at FM 105 Near Evadale High
roadClosures.description: - The roadway is closed due to Other conditions. - Follow the marked detour - Motorists should expect delays. FM 105 Northbound and Southbound Lanes at BNSF Railroad Crossing near Evadale High School will have a 24 Hour Closure from 5:00AM on Monday, 4/27/26 through Tuesday 4/28/26 at 5:00AM for Railroad Tie Replacement Project. Please use an alternate route or follow the marked detour. All work is weather permitting and subject to delays and changes. Please use Caution and expect Delays. Check DRIVETEXAS.ORG for updates.
